notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 12 CVEs: CVE-2025-40064, CVE-2025-40168, CVE-2026-31419, CVE-2026-23136, CVE-2026-31709, and 7 more.
notes.title: Description
